channel.title: 3D Printing on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in 3D Printing on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: Kayak Trailer
item.description: Back to 3D Printing Lightweight small can be taken along, fits in the kayak behind the seat models available for free on demand, feel free to ask on the forum Home Smart Mesh - website 00 real model

item.title: Switch Cover
item.description: Cover Dumb Switch with Smart Switch # STL Model 01 black and white 3dprints 02 black and white breakout 03 black and white back side

item.title: Switch Socket Cover
item.description: Cover Dumb Switch and smart Socket # STL Model Application # More details on the raspberry pi service

item.title: ESP32 remote
item.description: ESP32 Case for up/down remote control # STL models zip Application # More details on the ESP32 Arduino code 3D printing creation requires sometimes quite a number of iterations

item.title: Under desk shelf
item.description: Under desk shelf # 01 shelf overview 02 shelf top view 03 joint close up 04 joint placement 05 closer view

item.title: House model
item.description: House Model # 01 real house 02 model house 03 model side 04 side zoom 05 side path

item.title: Voronoi Shapes
item.description: Webapp # Voronoi Generator Tool Cells Circle # STL Model Fantasy pen holder # STL Model Fantasy Turtle Flower # STL Model Girafe round # STL Model
